title: Consumers Energy Building a Brighter Energy Future with Agreements to Purchase Solar Energy in Genesee, Hillsdale Counties
text: Two New Projects in 2024 Will Power 150,000 Homes JACKSON, Mich. , May 18, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Consumers Energy today announced agreements to add 300 megawatts of clean energy – enough to power about 150,000 homes -- from two Michigan solar projects being developed in Genesee and Hillsdale counties.

title: Here's Why CMS Energy (CMS) is a Strong Growth Stock
text: Whether you're a value, growth, or momentum investor, finding strong stocks becomes easier with the Zacks Style Scores, a top feature of the Zacks Premium research service.

title: Consumers Energy Searching for Landowners to Help Lead Michigan's Clean Energy Transformation
text: Company seeks acres for new solar plants, creates economic opportunity for landowners, communities JACKSON, Mich. , May 9, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Consumers Energy today announced it wants to work with landowners and communities to identify locations for utility-scale solar power plants that will provide clean, renewable electricity to Michigan for decades to come.

title: CMS Energy Corp (CMS) CEO Garrick Rochow on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: CMS Energy Corp (NYSE:CMS ) Q1 2022 Earnings Conference Call May 3, 2022 9:00 AM ET Company Participants Srikanth Maddipati - VP, IR & Finance and Treasurer Garrick Rochow - President, CEO & Director Rejji Hayes - EVP & CFO Conference Call Participants Michael Sullivan - Wolfe Research Jeremy Tonet - JPMorgan Chase & Co. Andrew Weisel - Scotiabank Insoo Kim - Goldman Sachs Group Shahriar Pourreza - Guggenheim Securities Jonathan Arnold - Vertical Research Partners Travis Miller - Morningstar Inc. Durgesh Chopra - Evercore ISI Gregg Orrill - UBS Julien Dumoulin-Smith - Bank of America Merrill Lynch Nicholas Campanella - Credit Suisse Paul Patterson - Glenrock Associates Anthony Crowdell - Mizuho Securities Operator Good morning, everyone, and welcome to the CMS Energy 2022 First Quarter Results. The earnings news release issued earlier today and the presentation used in this webcast are available on CMS Energy's website in the Investor Relations section.

title: CMS Energy (CMS) Q1 Earnings Beat, Revenues Increase Y/Y
text: CMS Energy's (CMS) Q1 operating revenues of $2,374 million exceed the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 11.5% and also increase 17.9% on a year-over-year basis.

title: CMS Energy (CMS) Tops Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: CMS Energy (CMS) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 6.19% and 11.51%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: CMS Energy Announces Strong First Quarter Results, Reaffirms 2022 Adjusted EPS Guidance
text: JACKSON, Mich. , May 3, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- CMS Energy announced today reported earnings per share of $1.21 for the first quarter of 2022, compared to $1.21 per share for the same quarter in 2021.

title: Utility Stocks Q1 Earnings Due on May 3: CNP, EIX & More
text: Total Q1 earnings of Utility stocks are expected to increase 9.3% year over year, while revenues are likely to decline 8%. CNP, EIX, CMS, PEG & CPK are set to report Q1 results on May 3
